assertions.title: Wallet button below header, above form

steps.observed: App loaded with Compare DEX Routers title

steps.action: Take annotated screenshot and inspect DOM structure
steps.expected: Wallet button rendered between header and form
steps.observed: DOM structure: #app > .app > [header.app-header, div.wallet-row, main.app-main]. The wallet-row div (containing the WalletButton with class connect-btn) is a direct sibling of header.app-header and comes before main.app-main (which contains the CompareForm). Screenshot confirms CONNECT WALLET button appears visually between the header and the form.

evidence.dom: div.wallet-row is a sibling of header.app-header and precedes main.app-main in .app container

steps.expected: header-actions contains only ThemeToggle and settings button, NO WalletButton
steps.observed: header-actions innerHTML: [button.theme-toggle, button.settings-btn] only. hasWalletButton: false. WalletButton's grandparent is div.wallet-row, not inside header-actions.

evidence.dom: header-actions children: [{tag: BUTTON, class: 'theme-toggle s-QC_WEnhYrrqh'}, {tag: BUTTON, class: 'settings-btn s-XsEmFtvddWTw'}]. No WalletButton present.

assertions.title: Default tokenlist entry always appears in settings

steps.observed: Settings modal opened with TOKEN LISTS section

steps.expected: Default tokenlist entry (url: null) is visible
steps.observed: Found div.tokenlist-entry with text 'Uniswap Labs Default 1367 tokens'. The entry has aria-label='Disable Uniswap Labs Default' (enabled state). DOM confirms this entry has url: null per code structure (tokenListStore._loadDefaultLists adds url: null entries).

evidence.dom: div.tokenlist-entry text: 'Uniswap Labs Default 1367 tokens', button class: 'tokenlist-toggle on', aria-label: 'Disable Uniswap Labs Default' (enabled)

assertions.title: Default tokenlist not removed by empty localStorage

steps.expected: Page reloads fresh with no localStorage data
steps.observed: Page reloaded at http://localhost:5173/ with networkidle

steps.action: Open Settings modal (gear icon) after reload
steps.expected: Default tokenlist still visible in TOKEN LISTS section
steps.observed: Settings modal opened and showed 'Uniswap Labs Default 1367 tokens' entry, identical to before localStorage was cleared. tokenListStore._ensureDefaultList() ensures url: null entry always exists.

evidence.network: API call to /tokenlist succeeded and returned default tokenlist; _ensureDefaultList fallback also present in code for when API fails

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Wallet button is correctly placed in its own wallet-row div between the header and form (VAL-WALLET-001 pass). Header-actions div contains only ThemeToggle and settings button, no WalletButton (VAL-WALLET-002 pass). Default tokenlist 'Uniswap Labs Default' is present and enabled in Settings modal (VAL-TKLIST-001 pass). Default tokenlist persists after clearing localStorage and reloading (VAL-TKLIST-002 pass).
